servers.name: FreeAppStore
servers.description: AI agent tools for the FreeAppStore platform. List apps, check deploy status, get SDK reference, fetch platform guide.

tools.name: list_apps
tools.description: List your published apps on FreeAppStore

tools.name: deploy_status
tools.description: Check GitHub Actions deploy status for any app

tools.name: app_info
tools.description: Get app URLs, repo, status, and store listing

tools.name: platform_guide
tools.description: Fetch the full SKILLS.md platform guide

tools.name: sdk_reference
tools.description: Quick SDK reference for auth, KV, counters, collections, rooms, proxy, keys, hooks, and UI components
